data.string: Communication with the server has timed out. Please restart Pokémon Dream World.
Unable to store local data. Please restart Pokémon Dream World.
To use Pokémon Dream World, please register your Game Sync ID on Pokémon Global Link.

You will receive your Game Sync ID for Pokémon Black Version or Pokémon White Version once you have progressed far enough in your adventure and obtained the C-Gear. Access GAME SYNC from the ONLINE screen of your C-Gear to receive your Game Sync ID. Once you have received it, you may register it with Pokémon Global Link. To do so, head to the profile page and click "Register ID."
To use Pokémon Dream World, you must access the Pokémon Global Link after you have tucked your Pokémon into bed in Pokémon Black Version or Pokémon White Version.
